pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage with primary search for storage and quick access to key tools.
primary_functions: Let users search for storage by ZIP, city, or address (with modes for finding units or locations)
Highlight links to Size Guide, Moving Supplies, and Promotions
Show a quick link to Help & FAQ for support
Provide global access to header and footer navigation

params.searchTerm: value entered in main search field

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit main homepage search with Find Storage mode selected or default unit search

params.searchTerm: value entered in main search field

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit main homepage search with Find Locations mode selected (used in tasks for Austin, TX and Seattle, WA)
Click Size Guide or What size do I need call-to-action on the homepage
Click Moving Supplies promo tile or button on the homepage
Click Help & FAQ link in homepage content

access_methods.description: Accessible via Home link in the global header navigation
Accessible via site logo or browser address bar as the root landing page
Users can access directly via the base site URL

pages.name: Unit Search Results
pages.description: Search results page listing individual storage units near a searched area.
primary_functions: Display storage unit results near a given ZIP, city, or address
Filter units by size category (e.g., small, medium, large), specific dimensions, and availability
Filter units by features such as drive_up_access, climate_controlled, and vehicle_access
Filter units by promotions such as first_month_free or other deals
Sort unit results by price_low_to_high, price_high_to_low, distance, or relevance
Let users click Reserve or Select on a unit card to start a reservation in reservation.html
Provide links from unit cards to view facility details in location_detail.html

incoming_params.description: ZIP, city, or address entered on the homepage or in the Find Storage header search to define the area to search for units (e.g., 94110)
View mode flag; when set to 'units' indicates that the page should show unit search results rather than redirecting to locations view
Optional size category filter such as small, medium, large, extra_large, or vehicle; can be applied via the filter UI and persisted in the URL
Optional comma-separated list of feature filter keys such as drive_up_access or climate_controlled applied from the filters panel
Optional promotion filter value such as first_month_free or discounted_rate
Optional maximum monthly rate filter, used to narrow results to units under a certain price (e.g., 80 for Task 1)
Sort key for unit results such as price_low_to_high, price_high_to_low, distance, or relevance

params.reservationId: reservation_id returned by startReservationForUnit for the selected unit

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Reserve or Select on a unit card after the unit is selected, creating or resuming a reservation

params.locationId: location_id associated with the clicked unit result

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click facility name or View details link on a unit card to see full location information and unit list

access_methods.description: Accessible via Find Storage link in the global header navigation (initially without searchTerm, prompting user to search)
Accessed after submitting the Find Storage search from the homepage or header with unit search mode selected
State (search term, filters, sorting) is maintained via query parameters to support back/forward navigation and deep linking

pages.name: Location Search Results
pages.description: Search results page listing storage facility locations.
primary_functions: Search for storage locations by ZIP, city, or address
Display a list of locations with distance, rating, address, and key badges (e.g., promotions, 24-hour access)
Adjust distance range (e.g., within 5, 10, 25 miles) via slider or dropdown
Sort locations by rating_high_to_low, distance, or price_estimate
Indicate locations that have promotions or deals via badges on the location cards
Provide View details links to open full facility information in location_detail.html
Provide View units buttons to jump directly to the units list in location_detail.html
Support pre-filtered searches from size_guide.html by limiting to locations that offer a given unit size

incoming_params.description: ZIP, city, or address for which to find nearby storage locations (e.g., 10001, 60611, Seattle, WA)
Selected distance radius for the search, such as 5, 10, or 25 miles
Sort order for results such as rating_high_to_low (used for Task 2), distance, or price_estimate
Optional minimum rating filter, such as 4.5, for users who only want highly rated facilities
Optional boolean filter indicating that only locations with climate-controlled units should be shown
Optional unit size identifier passed from the Size Guide to restrict results to locations that offer at least one available unit of that size
Optional mode flag such as 'size_guide' indicating the user came from the Size Guide flow and should see size-focused copy
View mode flag; when set to 'locations' indicates that the page should treat the search as a location search from the homepage

params.locationId: id of the clicked location result
params.unitSizeId: unitSizeId from URL if present to allow pre-filtering of the units list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click location name or View details on a location card to see full facility details

params.locationId: id of the clicked location result

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click View units on a location card to go directly to the units list for that facility

access_methods.description: Accessible via Locations link in the global header navigation
Accessed after submitting a location search from the homepage when the Locations mode is selected
Search term, distance, and other filters are stored in the query string to support deep links (e.g., 10-mile radius around 10001)

pages.name: Location Detail & Units
pages.description: Detail page for a specific storage facility, including units list, filters, and actions.
primary_functions: Show facility details such as address, map, phone, office hours, access hours, and overall rating
Display a units list for this facility with key details (size, type, climate control, drive-up, price, promotions)
Filter units by size category or explicit sizes (e.g., 5x10, 10x10 and larger)
Filter units by features such as climate_controlled, drive_up_access, indoor, outdoor, and vehicle_storage
Filter units by promotions such as first_month_free or discounted_rate
Sort units by price_low_to_high, price_high_to_low, or availability
Allow users to reserve a unit via a Reserve or Select button that leads to reservation.html for that unit
Offer a Set as preferred location button and handle confirmation (e.g., via modal) on this page
Provide a Schedule a tour or Book a visit button and show an in-page scheduling widget for selecting visit type, date, and time
Support unit lists filtered to a specific size when coming from size_guide.html or locations.html

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the facility to display; passed from location results, unit results, or featured promotions
Optional unit size identifier used to pre-filter the units list when coming from Location Search or the Size Guide (e.g., to show only the next larger size)
Optional indication of where the user navigated from (locations, units_search, size_guide, or homepage promotions) for analytics and back-link behavior

params.reservationId: reservation_id returned by startReservationForUnit for the chosen unit

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Reserve or Select on a unit in this facility's units list to start or continue a reservation

access_methods.description: Accessed when a locationId query parameter is present after the user selects a location from Locations results, unit results, or homepage promotions
May be linked directly from marketing or email using a URL that includes locationId

pages.name: Reservation & Checkout
pages.description: Multi-step reservation and add-ons flow for booking a storage unit.
primary_functions: Show selected unit details (facility, size, features, price, promotions) for confirmation
Let users choose a move-in date via a date picker (including specific dates like April 15, 2026 or the 1st of next month)
Collect required contact information fields (name, phone number, email address)
Let users select a payment option such as pay_at_move_in versus prepaid options
Present add-ons and protection options, including insurance or protection plans by coverage level (e.g., 3_000_coverage)
Allow comparison of multiple insurance plans at the same coverage level by monthly premium and select the lowest-cost option
Provide a progress flow (steps) so users can move from unit confirmation to move-in date, to personal details, to add-ons, to final review
Allow users to complete the reservation with a Complete Reservation or similar button and show an on-page confirmation state

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the pending reservation created by startReservationForUnit; required to load unit details and progress through checkout
Optional step indicator such as move_in_date, contact, add_ons, or review to control which stage of the multi-step flow is active

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to home or similar link after a reservation has been successfully finalized and confirmation shown

access_methods.description: Only accessible when a reservationId is present in the query string after a user starts a reservation from a unit card
Subsequent steps within the reservation flow are accessed by submitting forms that update the reservation details and reload the step parameter

pages.name: Size Guide & Calculator
pages.description: Tool to help users choose the right unit size based on household type and stored items.
primary_functions: Present an overview of standard unit sizes with descriptions and example contents
Offer an interactive calculator where users select a property type (e.g., 1_bedroom_apartment) and item checklist (e.g., queen_mattress, sofa, dining_table, boxes)
Calculate and display a recommended unit size based on user selections
List unit size cards around the recommended size, clearly indicating the recommended and the next larger option
Allow users to click View units and prices or See availability on a specific size card
From a size selection, link users to a location selection flow (e.g., locations.html with a size filter preset) where they can enter a ZIP like 30309 and choose a facility
Hand off the chosen size and location to location_detail.html so the units list is filtered to that size for price comparison and reservation

incoming_params.description: Optional property type value such as 1_bedroom_apartment used to pre-select the calculator input when deep-linking
Optional unit size identifier used to highlight a particular size card when returning to the Size Guide

params.unitSizeId: unit_size_id of the selected size card

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click View units and prices or See availability on a specific unit size card to choose a facility near a desired ZIP for that size

access_methods.description: Accessible via Size Guide link in the global header navigation
Accessible via Size guide link in the global footer
Accessed by clicking Size Guide or What size do I need links from the homepage or other marketing content

pages.name: Moving Supplies Landing
pages.description: Landing page for moving supplies and accessories sold through the site.
primary_functions: Show high-level categories such as Boxes & Packs, Packing Supplies, and Locks & Security
Let users click a category tile to view products in supplies_category.html
Highlight popular bundles or recommended starter kits for moving and storage
Provide quick access to the shopping cart via a cart icon or View cart link

incoming_params.description: Optional category identifier used to scroll or focus the view on a specific category section when arriving from a promotion

params.categoryId: id of the clicked supplies category

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a category tile such as Boxes & Packs, Packing Supplies, or Locks & Security
Click the cart icon or View cart link in the header or supplies landing page

access_methods.description: Accessible via Moving Supplies link in the global header navigation
Accessible via Moving supplies link in the global footer
Accessible from homepage promotions or confirmation pages highlighting moving supplies

pages.name: Moving Supplies Category
pages.description: Product list page for a specific moving supplies category.
primary_functions: Display a list of products for a chosen category (e.g., boxes, packing_materials, locks)
Show key product info such as name, price, pack size, and thumbnail image
Offer basic filters or sorting options by price or popularity if needed
Let users click a product title or image to see full details in product_detail.html
Support finding specific items like a medium_box_bundle under a target price and bubble_wrap or lock products under given price limits

incoming_params.description: Supplies category identifier (e.g., boxes_packs, packing_supplies, locks_security) that defines which products to list
Optional sort order for the products list, such as price_low_to_high or popularity
Optional maximum price filter used to help find items under a budget (e.g., bubble wrap under 10 or locks under 20)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product title or image in the category list to view full details
Click the cart icon or View cart link from the category page

access_methods.description: Accessed when a categoryId parameter is present after choosing a category from the Moving Supplies landing page
May be linked directly from marketing content to a specific supplies category with categoryId

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single moving supplies product.
primary_functions: Show full product details including name, description, dimensions, included quantity, and price
Allow users to set the desired quantity before adding the product to the cart
Provide an Add to cart button that updates the cart and confirmation messaging
Offer navigation back to the relevant category page or the main Moving Supplies landing page
Support key products needed in tasks such as medium_box_bundle, bubble_wrap, and disk_or_cylinder_locks

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the supplies product to display, such as a specific medium box bundle, bubble wrap, or lock

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click View cart or cart icon after adding one or more supplies products to the cart

params.categoryId: category_id returned by getSuppliesProductDetails for this product

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb or Back to category link to return to the listing for this product's category

access_methods.description: Accessed when a productId parameter is present after selecting a product from a category or featured list

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Page summarizing selected moving supplies items and total cost.
primary_functions: List all items currently in the cart with product name, price, quantity, and line totals
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart
Show the cart subtotal so users can verify they remain under a target budget (e.g., under $60)
Provide a path to proceed to checkout (if implemented) or continue shopping by returning to supplies.html

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Continue shopping button to go back to the Moving Supplies landing page

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon or View cart link present in the global header
Accessible from Moving Supplies pages after adding products and clicking View cart

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Support hub with searchable FAQs and help topics.
primary_functions: Provide a search field to search help content by keywords (e.g., vehicle_storage_access_hours)
Display a list of search results with article titles and brief summaries
Organize FAQs into categories such as reservations, access_hours, billing, and security for browsing
Link to detailed help articles in article.html
Offer a Still need help? or Contact us call-to-action that links to contact.html

incoming_params.description: Optional help search query to pre-populate the search field (e.g., vehicle storage access hours)
Optional help category filter such as reservations, access_hours, billing, security, vehicle_storage, or general

params.articleId: id of the clicked help article

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title from search results or category listings
Click Still need help? or Contact us call-to-action from the Help & FAQ landing page

access_methods.description: Accessible via Help link in the global header navigation
Accessible via Help & FAQ link in the global footer
Accessible from homepage or other pages that include a Help or FAQ call-to-action

pages.name: Help Article Detail
pages.description: Individual help article page for a specific support topic.
primary_functions: Display the full content of a selected help or FAQ article
Provide article navigation such as breadcrumbs or links back to help.html search results or categories
Show related articles to encourage self-service problem solving
Include a Still need help? or Contact us button at the bottom that leads to contact.html for further assistance

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the help article to display; obtained when a user clicks an article from Help & FAQ search or category lists

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Help Center or breadcrumb link to return to the relevant help category or search
Click Still need help? Contact us button at the bottom of an article related to access hours or security (e.g., vehicle storage access hours for Task 7)

access_methods.description: Accessed when an articleId parameter is present after selecting an article from Help & FAQ

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: Contact form page for submitting questions or issues to support.
primary_functions: Provide a topic or reason_for_contact dropdown with options including access_hours_and_security or similar
Offer a message text area for users to describe their question or issue (e.g., 24-hour access for vehicle storage at a specific Dallas location and any after-hours fees)
Collect basic contact details such as name and email address
Submit the inquiry via a Send message or Submit button and show a confirmation state
Allow users coming from help articles or other pages to easily send follow-up questions

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-selected topic for the inquiry such as access_hours_and_security, reservations, billing, website_technical_issue, or general_question
Optional free-text description of a related facility, e.g., 'Dallas, TX Main Street', used to provide additional context for the support team

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Help Center link after successfully submitting a contact message

access_methods.description: Accessible via Contact us link in the global footer
Accessible from Help & FAQ and Help Article pages via Still need help or Contact us calls-to-action

pages.name: About & Policies
pages.description: Informational page about the company, plus key policy summaries.
primary_functions: Provide an overview of the self-storage company and its services
Summarize key policies such as general terms_of_use, privacy_overview, and storage_rules in simple language
Offer links or sections that describe security, access hours philosophy, and customer support commitments
Serve as a reference page for users wanting more background about the business

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Contact us about our policies link within the About & Policies content

access_methods.description: Accessible via About & Policies link in the global footer
Can be linked directly from marketing or emails when referencing company policies

header_links.description: Search for available storage units by location
Find storage facility locations by city or ZIP
Get help choosing the right storage unit size
Shop for boxes, packing materials, and locks

footer_links.description: Learn about the company and key policies
Contact form for questions and support
Browse help articles and frequently asked questions
Storage unit size guide and calculator
View and purchase moving and packing supplies
